creator: russell.sutherland@utoronto.ca
text:
When I try to install the port it fails as follows:


[root@bsd /usr/ports/mail/p5-qpsmtpd]# make
[root@bsd /usr/ports/mail/p5-qpsmtpd]# make install
===>  Installing for p5-qpsmtpd-0.40
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/Net/DNS.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/MIME/Base64.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Mail/Header.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/IO/Socket/SSL.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on executable: spamd - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/Net/DNS/Resolver.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Date/Parse.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/File/Temp.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/Geo/IP.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Net/LDAP.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Digest/HMAC_MD5.pm - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on executable: clamd - found
===>   p5-qpsmtpd-0.40 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if mail/p5-qpsmtpd already installed
Writing /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/auto/qpsmtpd/.packlist
/usr/ports/mail/p5-qpsmtpd/work/qpsmtpd-0.40/README: Permission denied
*** Error code 126

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/p5-qpsmtpd.

How-To-Repeat: Occurs consistently when one tries to install the port
